mapper.sql: select chapter_id, course_id, parent_id, chapter_name, chapter_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_course_chapter
mapper.select: and course_id = #{courseId}and parent_id = #{parentId}and chapter_name like concat('%', #{chapterName}, '%')and status = #{status} order by chapter_order asc, chapter_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_course_chapter(course_id, parent_id, chapter_name, chapter_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{courseId}, #{parentId}, #{chapterName}, #{chapterOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_course_chapter course_id = #{courseId},parent_id = #{parentId},chapter_name = #{chapterName},chapter_order = #{chapterOrder},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_course_chapter where chapter_id in #{chapterId}
